EmailTemplate.description: CRM Team Email when a Legal Entity is create.
EmailTemplate.name: Legal Entity Created
EmailTemplate.subject: {!Legal_Entity__c.Name} - is created
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello
This is to notify that the Legal Entity {!Legal_Entity__c.Name} has been created.
View Legal Entity information by clicking here - {!Legal_Entity__c.Link}
This is an automated email, please do no reply to this email.
